message.content:
Explore the UI widget patterns and unit system in this UE5 project. I need to understand:

1. The ULFPUnitReplacementWidget pattern (Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPUnitReplacementWidget.h and .cpp) - this is the closest existing UI widget to what we'll build for battle results
2. The DeploymentWidget pattern (Source/LFP2D/UI/Fighting/LFPDeploymentWidget.h and .cpp) - another BindWidget UI pattern
3. The FLFPUnitEntry struct and ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset (Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h and Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPUnitRegistryDataAsset.h) - unit data structures
4. How existing widgets are created and managed by controllers
5. The TacticsUnit properties (Source/LFP2D/Unit/LFPTacticsUnit.h) - what data a unit has

Read all these files fully to understand the patterns used.

content.text: I'll explore these UI widget patterns and unit systems to understand how they're implemented in this UE5 project. Let me read all the relevant files.

content.content:
1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Engine/GameInstance.h"
     5→#include "LFPGameInstance.generated.h"
     6→
     7→class ALFPWorldMapNode;
     8→class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
     9→
    10→// 轻量单位数据：跨关卡保存用
    11→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    12→struct FLFPUnitEntry
    13→{
    14→	GENERATED_BODY()
    15→
    16→	// 单位类型 ID（对应 ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset 中的键）
    17→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit")
    18→	FName TypeID = NAME_None;
    19→
    20→	// 单位阶级
    21→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit")
    22→	int32 Tier = 1;
    23→
    24→	bool IsValid() const { return TypeID != NAME_None; }
    25→};
    26→
    27→// 战斗请求：世界地图 → 战斗场景传递的数据
    28→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    29→struct FLFPBattleRequest
    30→{
    31→	GENERATED_BODY()
    32→
    33→	// 触发战斗的节点 ID
    34→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    35→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    36→
    37→	// 战斗地图 CSV 文件名（对应 Saved/Maps/ 下的 CSV）
    38→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    39→	FString BattleMapName;
    40→
    41→	// 敌人星级
    42→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    43→	int32 StarRating = 1;
    44→
    45→	// 是否可逃跑
    46→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    47→	bool bCanEscape = true;
    48→
    49→	// 是否有有效请求
    50→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    51→	bool bIsValid = false;
    52→};
    53→
    54→// 战斗结果：战斗场景 → 世界地图传递的数据
    55→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    56→struct FLFPBattleResult
    57→{
    58→	GENERATED_BODY()
    59→
    60→	// 对应的节点 ID
    61→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    62→	int32 SourceNodeID = -1;
    63→
    64→	// 是否胜利
    65→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    66→	bool bVictory = false;
    67→
    68→	// 是否逃跑
    69→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    70→	bool bEscaped = false;
    71→
    72→	// 战斗中捕获的单位列表（背叛系统触发）
    73→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    74→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> CapturedUnits;
    75→
    76→	// 是否有有效结果
    77→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Battle")
    78→	bool bIsValid = false;
    79→};
    80→
    81→// 世界地图状态快照：跨关卡保持
    82→USTRUCT(BlueprintType)
    83→struct FLFPWorldMapSnapshot
    84→{
    85→	GENERATED_BODY()
    86→
    87→	// 当前世界地图名
    88→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    89→	FString WorldMapName;
    90→
    91→	// 玩家当前节点 ID
    92→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    93→	int32 CurrentNodeID = 0;
    94→
    95→	// 已消耗回合数
    96→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
    97→	int32 CurrentTurn = 0;
    98→
    99→	// 已访问节点
   100→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   101→	TSet<int32> VisitedNodeIDs;
   102→
   103→	// 已揭露节点
   104→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   105→	TSet<int32> RevealedNodeIDs;
   106→
   107→	// 已触发节点（战斗/事件/Boss 首次触发后不再触发）
   108→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   109→	TSet<int32> TriggeredNodeIDs;
   110→
   111→	// 是否有有效快照
   112→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "World Map")
   113→	bool bIsValid = false;
   114→};
   115→
   116→/**
   117→ * 游戏实例：跨关卡生命周期
   118→ * 负责世界地图 ↔ 战斗场景之间的状态传递
   119→ */
   120→UCLASS()
   121→class LFP2D_API ULFPGameInstance : public UGameInstance
   122→{
   123→	GENERATED_BODY()
   124→
   125→public:
   126→	// ============== 战斗请求/结果 ==============
   127→
   128→	// 设置战斗请求（世界地图调用，进入战斗前）
   129→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   130→	void SetBattleRequest(const FLFPBattleRequest& Request);
   131→
   132→	// 获取战斗请求（战斗场景调用，读取后清除）
   133→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   134→	FLFPBattleRequest ConsumeBattleRequest();
   135→
   136→	// 设置战斗结果（战斗场景调用，结束战斗时）
   137→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   138→	void SetBattleResult(const FLFPBattleResult& Result);
   139→
   140→	// 获取战斗结果（世界地图调用，读取后清除）
   141→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   142→	FLFPBattleResult ConsumeBattleResult();
   143→
   144→	// ============== 世界地图快照 ==============
   145→
   146→	// 保存世界地图状态快照
   147→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   148→	void SaveWorldMapSnapshot(const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& Snapshot);
   149→
   150→	// 获取世界地图快照（不清除，世界地图关卡可多次读取）
   151→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   152→	const FLFPWorldMapSnapshot& GetWorldMapSnapshot() const { return WorldMapSnapshot; }
   153→
   154→	// 是否有待处理的战斗结果
   155→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Scene Transition")
   156→	bool HasPendingBattleResult() const { return PendingBattleResult.bIsValid; }
   157→
   158→	// ============== 场景切换 ==============
   159→
   160→	// 切换到战斗场景
   161→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   162→	void TransitionToBattle(const FString& BattleLevelName);
   163→
   164→	// 切换回世界地图
   165→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Scene Transition")
   166→	void TransitionToWorldMap(const FString& WorldMapLevelName);
   167→
   168→	// 世界地图关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   169→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   170→	FString DefaultWorldMapLevelName = TEXT("Test_WorldMap");
   171→
   172→	// 战斗关卡名（蓝图中配置，默认值）
   173→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Scene Transition")
   174→	FString DefaultBattleLevelName = TEXT("Test_Fight");
   175→
   176→	// ============== 编队系统 ==============
   177→
   178→	// 单位注册表（蓝图中配置，全局唯一）
   179→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   180→	TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
   181→
   182→	// 出战队伍
   183→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   184→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> PartyUnits;
   185→
   186→	// 备战营
   187→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   188→	TArray<FLFPUnitEntry> ReserveUnits;
   189→
   190→	// 出战队伍上限
   191→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   192→	int32 MaxPartySize = 3;
   193→
   194→	// 备战营上限
   195→	UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Party")
   196→	int32 MaxReserveSize = 3;
   197→
   198→	// 尝试添加单位：先队伍 → 再备战 → 都满返回 false
   199→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   200→	bool TryAddUnit(const FLFPUnitEntry& Unit);
   201→
   202→	// 队伍是否已满
   203→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   204→	bool IsPartyFull() const { return PartyUnits.Num() >= MaxPartySize; }
   205→
   206→	// 备战营是否已满
   207→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Party")
   208→	bool IsReserveFull() const { return ReserveUnits.Num() >= MaxReserveSize; }
   209→
   210→	// 替换队伍中的单位
   211→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   212→	void ReplacePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
   213→
   214→	// 替换备战营中的单位
   215→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   216→	void ReplaceReserveUnit(int32 SlotIndex, const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit);
   217→
   218→	// 移除队伍单位
   219→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   220→	void RemovePartyUnit(int32 SlotIndex);
   221→
   222→	// 移除备战营单位
   223→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Party")
   224→	void RemoveReserveUnit(int32 SlotIndex);
   225→
   226→protected:
   227→	// 待处理的战斗请求
   228→	UPROPERTY()
   229→	FLFPBattleRequest PendingBattleRequest;
   230→
   231→	// 待处理的战斗结果
   232→	UPROPERTY()
   233→	FLFPBattleResult PendingBattleResult;
   234→
   235→	// 世界地图状态快照
   236→	UPROPERTY()
   237→	FLFPWorldMapSnapshot WorldMapSnapshot;
   238→};
   239→

1→#pragma once
     2→
     3→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     4→#include "Blueprint/UserWidget.h"
     5→#include "LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h"
     6→#include "LFPUnitReplacementWidget.generated.h"
     7→
     8→class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset;
     9→
    10→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE(FOnReplacementCompleteSignature);
    11→
    12→/**
    13→ * 单位替换 UI：当队伍和备战营都满时，展示新单位和当前阵容供玩家选择替换或放弃
    14→ * 具体布局由蓝图子类实现
    15→ */
    16→UCLASS()
    17→class LFP2D_API ULFPUnitReplacementWidget : public UUserWidget
    18→{
    19→	GENERATED_BODY()
    20→
    21→public:
    22→	// 初始化 UI 数据
    23→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Replacement UI")
    24→	void Setup(
    25→		const FLFPUnitEntry& NewUnit,
    26→		const TArray<FLFPUnitEntry>& CurrentParty,
    27→		const TArray<FLFPUnitEntry>& CurrentReserve,
    28→		ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset* Registry
    29→	);
    30→
    31→	// 替换队伍中指定槽位的单位
    32→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Replacement UI")
    33→	void ReplacePartySlot(int32 SlotIndex);
    34→
    35→	// 替换备战营中指定槽位的单位
    36→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Replacement UI")
    37→	void ReplaceReserveSlot(int32 SlotIndex);
    38→
    39→	// 放弃新单位
    40→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Replacement UI")
    41→	void DiscardNewUnit();
    42→
    43→	// 完成委托（替换或放弃后广播）
    44→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable)
    45→	FOnReplacementCompleteSignature OnReplacementComplete;
    46→
    47→protected:
    48→	// 待加入的新单位
    49→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Replacement UI")
    50→	FLFPUnitEntry PendingUnit;
    51→
    52→	// 注册表引用（用于获取图标、名称）
    53→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Replacement UI")
    54→	TObjectPtr<ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset> UnitRegistry;
    55→};
    56→

1→// Fill out your copyright notice in the Description page of Project Settings.
     2→
     3→#pragma once
     4→
     5→#include "CoreMinimal.h"
     6→#include "GameFramework/Actor.h"
     7→#include "LFP2D/HexGrid/LFPHexTile.h"
     8→#include "LFP2D/Turn/LFPBattleTypes.h"
     9→#include "LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h"
    10→#include "Components/TimelineComponent.h"
    11→#include "PaperSpriteComponent.h"
    12→#include "LFPTacticsUnit.generated.h"
    13→
    14→// 委托签名
    15→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_TwoParams(FOnHealthChangedSignature, int32, CurrentHealth, int32, MaxHealth);
    16→
    17→DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE(FOnUnitDeathSignature);
    18→
    19→// EUnitAffiliation 定义在 LFPBattleTypes.h 中
    20→
    21→class ULFPSkillBase;
    22→class ALFPHexGridManager;
    23→class ALFPTurnManager;
    24→class ULFPBetrayalCondition;
    25→class ALFPAIController;
    26→class ULFPSkillComponent;
    27→
    28→UCLASS()
    29→class LFP2D_API ALFPTacticsUnit : public APawn
    30→{
    31→	GENERATED_BODY()
    32→
    33→public:
    34→    ALFPTacticsUnit();
    35→
    36→    // 设置/获取当前坐标
    37→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    38→    void SetCurrentCoordinates(const FLFPHexCoordinates& NewCoords);
    39→
    40→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    41→    FLFPHexCoordinates GetCurrentCoordinates() const { return CurrentCoordinates; }
    42→
    43→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    44→    ALFPHexTile* GetCurrentTile();
    45→    //// 获取可移动范围
    46→    //UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    47→    //TArray<ALFPHexTile*> GetMovementRangeTiles();
    48→
    49→    // 可移动范围缓存
    50→    UPROPERTY(VisibleInstanceOnly, Category = "Unit State")
    51→    TArray<ALFPHexTile*> MovementRangeTiles;
    52→
    53→    // 移动到目标格子
    54→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    55→    bool MoveToTile(ALFPHexTile* NewTargetTile);
    56→
    57→    // 设置选中状态
    58→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    59→    void SetSelected(bool bSelected);
    60→
    61→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    62→    bool IsSelected() const { return bIsSelected; }
    63→
    64→    // 获取移动范围
    65→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    66→    int32 GetMovementRange() const { return CurrentMovePoints; }
    67→
    68→    // 消耗移动力
    69→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    70→    void ConsumeMovePoints(int32 Amount);
    71→
    72→	// 消耗行动力
    73→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    74→	void ConsumeActionPoints(int32 Amount);
    75→
    76→    // 检查是否有足够移动力
    77→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    78→    bool HasEnoughMovePoints(int32 Required) const;
    79→
    80→    // 检查是否有足够行动力
    81→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    82→    bool HasEnoughActionPoints(int32 Required) const;
    83→
    84→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    85→    int32 GetCurrentMovePoints() { return CurrentMovePoints; }
    86→
    87→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    88→    int32 GetMaxMovePoints() { return CurrentMovePoints; }
    89→
    90→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    91→	int32 GetActionPoints();
    92→
    93→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    94→    ALFPHexGridManager* GetGridManager() const;
    95→
    96→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Tactics Unit")
    97→    ALFPTurnManager* GetTurnManager() const;
    98→protected:
    99→    virtual void BeginPlay() override;
   100→    virtual void EndPlay(const EEndPlayReason::Type EndPlayReason) override;
   101→    virtual void Tick(float DeltaTime) override;
   102→
   103→    // 移动动画更新
   104→    UFUNCTION()
   105→    void UpdateMoveAnimation(float Value);
   106→
   107→    // 完成移动
   108→    void FinishMove();
   109→
   110→    // 吸附到网格
   111→    void SnapToGrid();
   112→
   113→protected:
   114→    // 单位属性
   115→    UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, EditAnywhere, Category = "Unit Stats")
   116→    int32 MovementRange = 5;
   117→
   118→    UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, EditAnywhere, Category = "Unit Stats")
   119→    int32 MaxMovePoints = 3;
   120→
   121→    UPROPERTY(VisibleInstanceOnly, Category = "Unit State")
   122→    int32 CurrentMovePoints;
   123→
   124→    // MaxActionPoints 和 CurrentActionPoints 已迁移至 TurnManager 的阵营 AP 系统
   125→
   126→    // 当前坐标
   127→    UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, EditAnywhere, Category = "Unit Stats")
   128→    int32 StartCoordinates_Q = 0;
   129→
   130→    UPROPERTY(BlueprintReadWrite, EditAnywhere, Category = "Unit Stats")
   131→    int32 StartCoordinates_R = 0;
   132→
   133→    FLFPHexCoordinates CurrentCoordinates;
   134→
   135→    // 选中状态
   136→    UPROPERTY(VisibleInstanceOnly, Category = "Unit State")
   137→    bool bIsSelected = false;
   138→
   139→    // 移动状态
   140→    UPROPERTY(Transient)
   141→    ALFPHexTile* TargetTile;
   142→
   143→    TArray<ALFPHexTile*> MovePath;
   144→    int32 CurrentPathIndex;
   145→    float MoveProgress;
   146→
   147→    // 动画
   148→    FTimerHandle MoveTimerHandle;
   149→    FTimeline MoveTimeline;
   150→
   151→    UPROPERTY(EditDefaultsOnly, Category = "Animation")
   152→    UCurveFloat* MoveCurve;
   153→
   154→    // 组件
   155→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, Category = "Components")
   156→    USceneComponent* RootSceneComponent;
   157→
   158→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, Category = "Components")
   159→    UPaperSpriteComponent* SpriteComponent;
   160→
   161→public:
   162→    // 回合系统相关
   163→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
   164→    void ResetForNewRound();
   165→
   166→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
   167→    bool CanAct() const { return !bHasActed && bOnTurn; }
   168→
   169→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
   170→    int32 GetSpeed() const { return Speed; }
   171→
   172→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
   173→    bool HasActed() const { return bHasActed; }
   174→
   175→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Turn System")
   176→    void SetHasActed(bool bActed) { bHasActed = bActed; }
   177→
   178→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, BlueprintPure, Category = "Turn System")
   179→    UTexture2D* GetUnitIcon() const { return UnitIconTexture; }
   180→
   181→    // 回合事件
   182→    UFUNCTION()
   183→    void OnTurnStarted();
   184→
   185→    UFUNCTION()
   186→    void OnTurnEnded();
   187→
   188→public:
   189→    // 回合系统属性
   190→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Unit Stats")
   191→    int32 Speed = 5; // 速度值，决定行动顺序
   192→
   193→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Unit State")
   194→    bool bHasActed = false;
   195→
   196→    UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Unit State")
   197→    bool bOnTurn = false;
   198→
   199→    UPROPERTY(EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category = "Turn System")
   200→    UTexture2D* UnitIconTexture;
   201→
   202→public:
   203→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintCallable, Category = "Mouse Input")
   204→    void OnMouseEnter();
   205→
   206→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintImplementableEvent, Category = "Mouse Input")
   207→    void OnMouseExit();
   208→
   209→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintImplementableEvent, Category = "Mouse Input")
   210→    void OnMouseClick();
   211→
   212→	// 在单位上广播血量变化事件
   213→public:
   214→	// 事件：血量变化
   215→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Unit Events")
   216→	FOnHealthChangedSignature OnHealthChangedDelegate;
   217→
   218→	// 事件：单位死亡
   219→	UPROPERTY(BlueprintAssignable, Category = "Unit Events")
   220→    FOnUnitDeathSignature OnDeathDelegate;
   221→
   222→	// 获取当前血量
   223→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   224→	int32 GetCurrentHealth() const { return CurrentHealth; }
   225→
   226→	// 获取最大血量
   227→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   228→	int32 GetMaxHealth() const { return MaxHealth; }
   229→
   230→    // 获取攻击力
   231→    UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   232→    int32 GetAttackPower() const { return AttackPower; }
   233→
   234→	// 获取阵营标识
   235→	UFUNCTION(BlueprintPure, Category = "Unit Combat")
   236→    EUnitAffiliation GetAffiliation() const { return Affiliation; }
   237→
   238→	// 血条组件
   239→	UPROPERTY(VisibleAnywhere, BlueprintReadOnly, Category = "Components")
   240→	class UWidgetComponent* HealthBarComponent;
   241→
   242→	// 初始化血条

content.text: Now let me check the implementation files for these controllers to see how widgets are created:
Let me search for how the deployment widget is created and used in the player controller:
Perfect! Now let me read the full deployment phase implementation to see the complete pattern:

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive summary document of the UI widget patterns and unit system.

## Comprehensive UI Widget Patterns & Unit System Analysis

Based on my exploration of the LFP2D UE5 project, here's a detailed understanding of the patterns used:

### 1. **ULFPUnitReplacementWidget Pattern** 
**File:** `Source/LFP2D/UI/WorldMap/LFPUnitReplacementWidget.h/.cpp`

**Purpose:** Handles unit roster management when both party and reserve teams are full (world map scene)

**Key Characteristics:**
- Lightweight UI for displaying unit replacement decisions
- Uses `FLFPUnitEntry` struct (lightweight data, not full unit instances)
- Takes 4 parameters in `Setup()`: new unit, current party, current reserve, unit registry reference
- Broadcasts completion via `OnReplacementComplete` delegate
- Only stores the `PendingUnit` and `UnitRegistry` reference
- Three action methods: `ReplacePartySlot()`, `ReplaceReserveSlot()`, `DiscardNewUnit()`
- All UI layout defined in Blueprint subclass (C++ only handles data and business logic)

**Widget Management (ALFPWorldMapGameMode):**
```
ShowNextReplacementUI():
  - Creates widget via CreateWidget<ULFPUnitReplacementWidget>(PC, ReplacementWidgetClass)
  - Calls Setup() with unit data and registries
  - Binds OnReplacementComplete delegate
  - Adds to viewport with z-order 100
OnReplacementComplete():
  - Removes widget from parent
  - Unbinds delegate
  - Shows next replacement UI (queue processing)
```

---

### 2. **ULFPDeploymentWidget Pattern**
**File:** `Source/LFP2D/UI/Fighting/LFPDeploymentWidget.h/.cpp`

**Purpose:** Manages unit placement UI during deployment phase (battle scene)

**Key Characteristics:**
- Uses BindWidget pattern for 9 UI components (3 unit buttons, 3 unit images, 1 confirm button)
- Caches party data and registry in memory
- Maintains `PlacedStates` array to track which units have been placed
- Visual feedback: placed units become semi-transparent (0.5 opacity)
- Two multicast delegates: `OnUnitSelected` (passes PartyIndex), `OnConfirmPressed`
- Button click callbacks are private, delegate to public events
- `NativeConstruct()` binds all button click events in C++
- Helper methods: `GetUnitButton()`, `GetUnitImage()`, `UpdateSlotVisual()`

**Widget Lifecycle:**
```
Creation (OnDeploymentPhaseStarted in PlayerController):
  - CreateWidget<ULFPDeploymentWidget>(this, DeploymentWidgetClass)
  - Setup(GI->PartyUnits, GI->UnitRegistry)
  - OnUnitSelected.AddDynamic() → StartPlacingUnit()
  - OnConfirmPressed.AddDynamic() → ConfirmDeployment()
  - AddToViewport()

Cleanup (ConfirmDeployment):
  - RemoveDynamic all delegates
  - RemoveFromParent()
```

---

### 3. **FLFPUnitEntry Struct & Unit Data**
**File:** `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPGameInstance.h`

**Structure:**
```cpp
struct FLFPUnitEntry {
    FName TypeID = NAME_None;      // Unique identifier for unit type
    int32 Tier = 1;                 // Unit rank/level
    bool IsValid() const;           // Validation helper
};
```

**Purpose:** Lightweight cross-level unit representation (no actual Actor instances)
- Used for persistent storage in party/reserve arrays
- Converted to/from full `ALFPTacticsUnit` actors during battles
- Each unit's icon/display name retrieved via registry lookup

---

### 4. **ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset**
**File:** `Source/LFP2D/Core/LFPUnitRegistryDataAsset.h/.cpp`

**Structure:**
```cpp
struct FLFPUnitRegistryEntry {
    TSubclassOf<ALFPTacticsUnit> UnitClass;  // Spawnable blueprint class
    FText DisplayName;                        // UI display name
    TObjectPtr<UTexture2D> Icon;             // UI icon texture
};

class ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset : public UDataAsset {
    TMap<FName, FLFPUnitRegistryEntry> UnitRegistry;  // TypeID → Entry
    bool FindEntry(FName TypeID, FLFPUnitRegistryEntry& OutEntry);
    TSubclassOf<ALFPTacticsUnit> GetUnitClass(FName TypeID);
};
```

**Key Usage:**
- Global singleton stored in GameInstance
- Lookup by TypeID from `FLFPUnitEntry`
- Provides icon texture to UI widgets
- Provides unit class for spawning in deployment phase
- Used by all UI widgets needing unit metadata

---

### 5. **ALFPTacticsUnit Core Properties**
**File:** `Source/LFP2D/Unit/LFPTacticsUnit.h`

**Unit Identity:**
```cpp
FName UnitTypeID = NAME_None;              // Corresponds to registry TypeID
int32 UnitTier = 1;                         // Unit rank
FLFPUnitEntry ToUnitEntry() const;         // Convert to lightweight entry
```

**Combat Stats:**
```cpp
int32 MaxHealth = 100;
int32 CurrentHealth = 100;
int32 AttackPower = 10;
int32 Defense = 5;
int32 Speed = 5;                            // Turn order priority
```

**Movement/Grid:**
```cpp
int32 MovementRange = 5;                    // Hex grid distance
int32 MaxMovePoints = 3;
int32 CurrentMovePoints;
FLFPHexCoordinates CurrentCoordinates;      // Cube coordinate on grid
```

**Affiliation:**
```cpp
EUnitAffiliation Affiliation = EUnitAffiliation::UA_Player;
// UA_Player, UA_Enemy, UA_Neutral
```

**Components:**
- `UPaperSpriteComponent* SpriteComponent` - 2D rendering
- `UWidgetComponent* HealthBarComponent` - Health bar UI above unit
- `UWidgetComponent* PlannedSkillIconComponent` - Enemy plan preview
- `ULFPSkillComponent* SkillComponent` - Skill management

**Events:**
- `FOnHealthChangedSignature OnHealthChangedDelegate` - Health change broadcasts
- `FOnUnitDeathSignature OnDeathDelegate` - Death broadcasts

---

### 6. **Widget Creation & Management Pattern**

**Universal Pattern:**
1. **Creation** - In BeginPlay() or relevant initialization
   - Use `CreateWidget<T>(PlayerController, WidgetClass)`
   - Immediately call `Setup()` with relevant data
   - Bind necessary delegates to callback functions
   - `AddToViewport()` with optional z-order

2. **Data Flow**
   - Get data from GameInstance (party arrays, registries)
   - Pass to widget via `Setup()`
   - Widget caches data in UPROPERTY members
   - Widget uses cached data for UI updates

3. **Event Delegation**
   - Widget declares `DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE` signatures
   - Buttons/inputs trigger these delegates
   - Controller binds with `AddDynamic()` in creation
   - Controller implements callback functions

4. **Cleanup** - When phase ends
   - `RemoveDynamic()` all bound delegates
   - `RemoveFromParent()`
   - Optionally `Destroy()` if dynamic creation

---

### 7. **Key Design Patterns Observed**

**A. BindWidget Pattern (DeploymentWidget):**
- Declare UPROPERTY with `meta = (BindWidget)` in C++
- Name must match widget BP hierarchy exactly
- Automatically bound by Slate in `NativeConstruct()`
- Best for static, reusable UI components

**B. Data-Driven Design:**
- Unit data stored as lightweight `FLFPUnitEntry` structs
- Registry maps TypeID → metadata (icon, class, name)
- Separates persistent data from scene-specific instances

**C. Delegate-Based Communication:**
- UI widgets don't directly call controller methods
- Instead broadcast multicast delegates
- Controller subscribes at creation time
- Decouples widget from controller specifics

**D. Component Composition:**
- UI widgets composed of Button/Image components
- Array indices match party/unit indices
- Helper methods abstract array access pattern

---

### 8. **File Relationships**

```
LFPGameInstance.h
  ├── Contains: FLFPUnitEntry, FLFPBattleRequest/Result
  ├── Stores: PartyUnits[], ReserveUnits[], UnitRegistry reference
  └── Used by: All UI widgets, game modes, player controllers

ULFPUnitRegistryDataAsset
  ├── Provides: UnitClass, Icon texture, DisplayName for each TypeID
  └── Referenced by: All UI widgets, deployment spawning

LFPDeploymentWidget (Battle Scene)
  ├── Created by: ALFPTacticsPlayerController.OnDeploymentPhaseStarted()
  ├── Receives: PartyUnits array, UnitRegistry
  └── Communicates: OnUnitSelected (PartyIndex), OnConfirmPressed

LFPUnitReplacementWidget (World Map Scene)
  ├── Created by: ALFPWorldMapGameMode.ShowNextReplacementUI()
  ├── Receives: Single FLFPUnitEntry, PartyUnits[], ReserveUnits[], UnitRegistry
  └── Communicates: OnReplacementComplete delegate

ALFPTacticsUnit
  ├── Property: UnitTypeID (links to registry)
  ├── Method: ToUnitEntry() (converts to FLFPUnitEntry)
  └── Components: HealthBar, PlannedSkillIcon widgets
```

---

### 9. **Battle Results → Unit Capture Flow**

```
Battle Ends (TurnManager)
  → FLFPBattleResult.CapturedUnits[] = captured unit FLFPUnitEntry structs

World Map GameMode.HandleBattleResult()
  → ProcessCapturedUnits(Result.CapturedUnits)
    → For each unit: GI->TryAddUnit() (add to party or reserve)
    → If both full: Add to PendingCapturedUnits queue
    → ShowNextReplacementUI() - queue processor

ShowNextReplacementUI()
  → CreateWidget<ULFPUnitReplacementWidget>(PC, WidgetClass)
  → ReplacementWidget->Setup(NextUnit, CurrentParty, CurrentReserve, Registry)
  → Bind OnReplacementComplete.AddDynamic(OnReplacementComplete)
  → AddToViewport(100)

OnReplacementComplete (after user chooses):
  → RemoveFromParent()
  → ShowNextReplacementUI() - next in queue or finish
```

This is the exact pattern we should follow for the battle results UI widget.
